attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD, /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
 
  /* Added for GCSP */
  ,DV_GCSP_FLG
  ,BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT
   /* Added for GCSP */
  ,WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE
  ,WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_BKGS_CHANNEL_TYPE
  ,WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION,
  OTM_OVERRIDE_PTNR_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  MNL_PTNR_SITE_OVERRIDE_FLG,
  MANUAL_PTNR_OVERRIDE_REASON_CD
 FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_RET_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE

SEL    NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  ,
            NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  ,
            NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE          ,
            NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
            NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME ,
            PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY ,
            PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_ID_INT AS BE_ID ,
            PARTNER_HIER.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT AS BE_GEO_ID ,
            ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_ID   ,
            ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_NAME ,
            ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS PARTNER_COUNTRY ,
            ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY  ,
            BILLTO_HIER.SITE_USE_ID AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_ID 
    FROM    (
        SEL  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  ,
                BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  ,
                BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
                BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
                END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
                DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
        FROM    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
        WHERE   1=1 
            AND NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DIRECT'  ) NBM 
    /*INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM*/
    /*Modified as part of proactive Tuning*/
    INNER JOIN (SEL BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE GROUP BY 1,2,3) NBCM 
    /*Modified as part of proactive Tuning*/
        ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY     
        AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
        AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE    
        AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP')    
        AND NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0    
        AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE >= '2015-07-26'  /* from FY16  onwards*/ 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO_HIER BILLTO_HIER    
        ON BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   
        AND BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0    
        AND BILLTO_HIER.STATUS_CODE = 'A' 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY  PARTNER_HIER    
        ON BILLTO_HIER.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  
        AND PARTNER_HIER.STATUS_CD = 'A'  
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
        ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER   
        ON PARTNER_HIER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER  ENDCUST_HIER    
        ON NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = ENDCUST_HIER.END_CUSTOMER_KEY    
        AND ENDCUST_HIER.STATUS_CODE  = 'A' 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST   
        ON ENDCUST_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO    
        ON BILLTO_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SEL  
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NXAASL.BOOKED_DT 
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_ID_INT AS BE_ID
,PARTNER_HIER.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT AS BE_GEO_ID
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_ID  
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_NAME
,ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS PARTNER_COUNTRY
,ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY                                         
,BILLTO_HIER.SITE_USE_ID AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_ID
FROM (SEL 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
WHERE 1=1
AND NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DIRECT'
) NBM
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM
	ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
	AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
	AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
	AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('XAAS')
	AND NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 
	AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE >= '2015-07-26' /* from FY16  onwards*/
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX    NXAASL
	ON NXAASL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO_HIER BILLTO_HIER
	ON BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0
	AND BILLTO_HIER.STATUS_CODE = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY  PARTNER_HIER
	ON BILLTO_HIER.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
	AND PARTNER_HIER.STATUS_CD = 'A' 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER
	ON PARTNER_HIER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER   ENDCUST_HIER
	ON NBM. END_CUSTOMER_KEY = ENDCUST_HIER.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND ENDCUST_HIER.STATUS_CODE  = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST
	ON ENDCUST_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO
	ON BILLTO_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SEL  
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NADJL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATE
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_ID_INT AS BE_ID
,PARTNER_HIER.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT AS BE_GEO_ID
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_ID  
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_NAME
,ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS PARTNER_COUNTRY
,ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY                                         
,BILLTO_HIER.SITE_USE_ID AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_ID
FROM (SEL 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
WHERE 1=1
AND NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DIRECT'
) NBM
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM
	ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
	AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
	AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
	AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('SLS_ADJ')
	AND NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 
	AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE >= '2015-07-26' /* from FY16  onwards*/
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE    NADJL
	ON NADJL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO_HIER BILLTO_HIER
	ON BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0
	AND BILLTO_HIER.STATUS_CODE = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY  PARTNER_HIER
	ON BILLTO_HIER.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
	AND PARTNER_HIER.STATUS_CD = 'A' 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER
	ON PARTNER_HIER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER   ENDCUST_HIER
	ON NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = ENDCUST_HIER.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND ENDCUST_HIER.STATUS_CODE  = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST
	ON ENDCUST_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO
	ON BILLTO_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SEL  
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NBKGL.DSTRBTR_RSLR_SALES_ORDER_DT , NPOSL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE ) AS POS_ORDER_DT 
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_ID_INT AS BE_ID
,PARTNER_HIER.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT AS BE_GEO_ID
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_ID  
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_NAME
,ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS PARTNER_COUNTRY
,ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY                                         
,SOLDTO_HIER.SITE_USE_ID AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_ID
FROM (SEL 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM1
WHERE 1=1
AND NBM1.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DIRECT'
) NBM
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM
            ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
            AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
            AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
            AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS')
            AND NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 
			AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE >= '2015-07-26' /* from FY16  onwards*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO_HIER SOLDTO_HIER
            ON SOLDTO_HIER.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
            AND SOLDTO_HIER.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0
            AND SOLDTO_HIER.STATUS_CODE = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY  PARTNER_HIER
            ON SOLDTO_HIER.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
            AND PARTNER_HIER.STATUS_CD = 'A' 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOSL
            ON NPOSL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NBKGL
            ON NBKGL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER
            ON PARTNER_HIER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER   ENDCUST_HIER
    ON NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = ENDCUST_HIER.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
            AND ENDCUST_HIER.STATUS_CODE  = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST
            ON ENDCUST_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_SOLDTO
            ON SOLDTO_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_SOLDTO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SEL  
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_ID_INT AS BE_ID
,PARTNER_HIER.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT AS BE_GEO_ID
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_ID  
,ENDCUST_HIER.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_GU_NAME
,ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS PARTNER_COUNTRY
,ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS END_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY                                         
,BILLTO_HIER.SITE_USE_ID AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_ID
FROM (SEL 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE         
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
WHERE 1=1
AND NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DIRECT'

) NBM
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM
	ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
	AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
	AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
	AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR')
	AND NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 
	AND NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0
	AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE >= '2015-07-26' /* from FY16  onwards*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO_HIER BILLTO_HIER
	ON BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND BILLTO_HIER.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0
	AND BILLTO_HIER.STATUS_CODE = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY  PARTNER_HIER
	ON BILLTO_HIER.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY = PARTNER_HIER.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
	AND PARTNER_HIER.STATUS_CD = 'A' 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
	ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER
	ON PARTNER_HIER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ISO_CNTRY_PARTNER.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_ENDCUST_HIER   ENDCUST_HIER
	ON NBM. END_CUSTOMER_KEY = ENDCUST_HIER.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
	AND ENDCUST_HIER.STATUS_CODE  = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST
	ON ENDCUST_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_ENDCUST.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO
	ON BILLTO_HIER.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD=  ISO_CNTRY_BILLTO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
